overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy walking along a rocky riverbank at golden hour sunset, then transitioning via fade-to-black to explore overgrown post-apocalyptic urban ruins illuminated by teal neon lights. The character encounters large robotic dinosaur-like machines while navigating through vegetation-covered concrete structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank at golden hour sunset

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky riverbank toward the water, then wading through the shallow stream while heading toward the sunset

entered.detail: calm river reflecting the golden sunset and orange sky
pebble and rock-covered riverbank along the water edge
rocky outcroppings and boulders lining the river
orange and purple sunset sky with scattered clouds
mountain range silhouetted against the bright sunset

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky riverbank during a vibrant golden hour sunset. The camera follows from behind as she moves from the gravel shore into the shallow water, with the sun creating a bright reflection on the river surface and distant mountains visible against the colorful sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown post-apocalyptic urban ruins with teal neon lighting

events.description: screen fades to black transitioning from river sunset to dark neon-lit urban ruins environment
massive robotic Tallneck machine emerges from behind ruins on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense overgrown ruins, observing the environment and large robotic creatures while walking along the path

notable_agents.action: massive robotic Tallneck with long neck walking slowly through the ruins
large spiked robotic creature grazing near the path

entered.detail: decayed multi-story concrete building covered in vines and vegetation
glowing blue vertical neon sign attached to building facade
illuminated sign reading 'LONDRA' on distant building wall
mysterious floating blue light sources in the distant ruins
tall crumbling stone tower structure covered in greenery

segments.scene_description: Following a fade to black, the scene shifts to dark overgrown urban ruins bathed in teal neon light. The character explores the environment, passing decayed concrete buildings with glowing signs including one reading 'LONDRA'. Around the 30-second mark, a massive robotic Tallneck emerges on the right, and the character continues walking between large robotic creatures while navigating the vegetation-covered ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that transforms from a serene natural riverbank at sunset into a dark, neon-lit urban wasteland. It begins with the camera following the character from behind as she moves from a gravel shore into shallow water, with the golden hour sun reflecting brightly off the river surface against a backdrop of distant mountains. As the screen fades to black, the environment shifts abruptly to overgrown ruins bathed in an eerie teal neon glow. The scene then expands to reveal decayed concrete buildings and glowing signs, including one reading LONDRA, as the character navigates the vegetation-covered structures. Finally, the camera tracks her movement as a massive robotic Tallneck emerges on the right, leading her deeper into the ruins among other large robotic creatures.
